• Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game with procedurally generated maps and real-time networking.
  • Players can mine resources, build structures, upgrade equipment, and trade with others in a shared world.
  • Features include mobile controls, chat, admin tools, save systems, and cloud synchronization.
    const TILE_TYPES = { EMPTY: 0, DIRT: 1, STONE: 3, COAL: 6, IRON: 7, GOLD: 8, DIAMOND: 9, ... };
    const CONSTANTS = { TILE_SIZE: 32, CHUNK_SIZE: 16, SPEED_NORMAL: 1.75, SPEED_DRILL: 0.75, ... };

Mega Miner NG is a multiplayer mining game where players explore procedurally generated underground worlds, mine resources, build structures, and upgrade their equipment. The game features real-time networking, mobile controls, chat functionality, admin tools, and cloud save synchronization. Players can trade resources, discover teleporters, and collaborate or compete in a shared mining environment.
